channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: President Mnangagwa’s faction Risks Violent Coup... Military Faction Warns of Mugabe’s Fate as Generals Turn Against ED
item.description: The current political climate in Zimbabwe is fraught with tension, as President Emmerson Mnangagwa, once hailed as a pragmatist after the 2017 coup that unseated Robert Mugabe, now faces a formidable challenge from within his own ruling establishment. His ambition to extend his tenure beyond the constitutionally mandated term has ignited a fierce internal struggle, [...] The post President Mnangagwa’s faction Risks Violent Coup... Military Faction Warns of Mugabe’s Fate as Generals Turn Against ED first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zanu PF not losing sleep over xenophobia targeting Zimbabweans in South Africa: Mutsvangwa @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: ZANU PF says it is unfazed by xenophobic sentiments currently prevailing in South Africa, which may potentially put more than a million Zimbabweans residing in the neighbouring country in danger. Foreign nationals have been put on notice in South Africa to leave the country by pro-anti-migrant groups and political parties. This has ignited a wave [...] The post Zanu PF not losing sleep over xenophobia targeting Zimbabweans in South Africa: Mutsvangwa appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Highlanders crisis deepens as players extend training boycott before Dynamos showdown
item.description: Highlanders’ turmoil worsens as players continue training boycott ahead of a crucial Castle Lager Premiership clash against Dynamos. The post Highlanders crisis deepens as players extend training boycott before Dynamos showdown appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: ‘Don’t idolise Jonasi Gomora’: S’dumo Mtshali warns men against glorifying The Polygamist character @nehandaradio
item.description: South African actor S’dumo Mtshali has urged men not to romanticise Jonasi Gomora, saying the central character in Netflix’s The Polygamist ultimately destroys his life through deception, infidelity and unchecked ego. The post ‘Don’t idolise Jonasi Gomora’: S’dumo Mtshali warns men against glorifying The Polygamist character appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: SA permit crisis deepens as xenophobic violence forces mass exodus @zimsituation
item.description: SA permit crisis deepens as xenophobic violence forces mass exodus Source: SA permit crisis deepens as xenophobic violence forces mass exodus -Newsday Zimbabwe SOUTH African’s Department of Home Affairs has launched a stakeholder consultative process on the future of the Zimbabwean Exemption Permit (ZEP) and Lesotho Exemption Permit (LEP) programmes following a landmark court ruling [...] The post SA permit crisis deepens as xenophobic violence forces mass exodus appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: The Tail Lying In The Leaves @zimsituation
item.description: Source: The Tail Lying In The Leaves – Cathy Buckle Dear Family and Friends, Driving behind a commuter kombi (minibus) on a road littered with potholes and humps, the kombi kept cutting in front of me, stopping to pick up more passengers, overtaking me and then cutting me off again. The kombi’s back window was [...] The post The Tail Lying In The Leaves appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Anti-migrant myths that have been allowed to fester in South Africa @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Anti-migrant myths that have been allowed to fester in South Africa | News24 People gather to stage an anti-immigrant demonstration to call on the government to deport irregular immigrants in the Benoni area east of Johannesburg on 5 June 2026. Ihsaan Haffejee/Anadolu via Getty Images Rising xenophobia is fuelled by narratives that woefully and [...] The post Anti-migrant myths that have been allowed to fester in South Africa appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
